Email and calendar
made better
Fast, private email hosting for you or your business.
Try free for 30 days
For business
No obligation, no credit card required.
Mail
Contacts
Calendar
Why Fastmail?
“I have used Fastmail for years and never had one problem. Not one.”
“I migrated from Google Workspace to Fastmail and would never go back.”
“I've been using Fastmail for more than ten years. I couldn't be happier.”
Better
for staying on top of it all
See how much better email and calendars can be when it’s super fast, has great search, and surfaces the information you need, right when you need it.
Boost your productivity
Pin
important messages to the top of your inbox for instant access.
Find any message in seconds with our powerful
search
.
Snooze
tickets and bills to just when you need them.
Stay productive
offline
— read, draft, search, and manage mail, calendar, and contacts.
Protect your privacy
Keep your real email address private with
Masked Email
.
Use
aliases
to keep your side hustles separate.
Stop spy pixels
tracking your location.
Get organized
Stay on schedule with our
fast, beautiful calendar
.
Know exactly what’s changed
when someone updates an event.
See all your events in one place by adding your
Google or iCloud calendars
.
Stay focused
Elegant
native apps
for every platform.
Avoid unwanted interruptions with
VIP-only notifications
.
Work on your time with
scheduled send
.
Add
private memos
to messages such as reminders, payment dates, or notes.
Better
isn’t easy to describe, but you know it when you see it
Best alternative to Gmail and iCloud for email, calendars, and contacts!
Jon Henshaw
Founder of Coywolf
I have used Fastmail for years and found them consistently excellent.
Dylan Beattie
Creator of the Rockstar programming language
Fastmail rocks! It’s secure, private, independent, and has a Gmail transfer tool. You won’t regret the move.
Vicky Brasseur
Open source expert and author
Better
for your peace of mind
Private
Free email isn’t really free: you’re paying with your privacy. As a paid service, we only serve you, our customer. This means we have no split loyalties, no mining of your personal data, no sharing it with third parties, and no ads, ever.
See plans
Secure
Your email unlocks access to everything you do on the web. It’s the history of where you’ve been, what you buy, and who you know. We take great measures to keep it secure, backed up, and always available to you — and no one else.
Learn about email security
Personal support
From “how do I get started” to “I’ve lost my phone” panic, when you need that extra helping hand, we’re here for you. Our support team are online 24/7, providing personal support to ensure your email runs smoothly.
Get support
No lock-in
We’ve been delivering a better service for over 20 years, growing all that time — because once you’ve tried it, you won’t settle for anything else. People stay because we’re the best, not because it’s too hard to get your data out. After all, it’s your data, not ours.
Read our values
Better
for everyone
We won’t let email become just another closed messaging service owned by big tech.
We don’t just make a better email service. We also make email better for everyone with our work advancing open standards and leading industry co-operation. We employ the top experts on email and calendaring, working on everything from email authentication to calendar interoperability.
Our contributions include the development of JMAP, the next-generation open sync protocol, and a wide range of open-source code used by organizations around the world. Our work keeps the internet open, and stops email becoming just another walled garden.
Read about open source and standards

Better features
More productive, lightning fast, simple and built to save you time.
“I’ve used every mail client known to man. The one I am enjoying the most is Fastmail. Their web client is terrific.”
“Keep growing and continue innovating, Fastmail. There is no better hosted email solution on the planet.”
“Fastmail stands out as the top choice for custom domain emails, whether for business or personal use.”
Fast. Private. Secure. Choose any three.
The fastest email service money can buy
Your time is too important to be spent waiting on email to load.
Learn more
Security with substance
Keep your email private and secure, with robust encryption of your data both in transit and at rest.
Learn more
Private, naturally
We believe privacy is a fundamental human right, and we are always looking for meaningful actions we can do to further protect your privacy.
Learn more
Rock-solid reliability
Your email is vital to your success, and you need it to be available 24/7.
Learn more
You’ll be up and running in no time
Migrate in minutes
It’s easy to copy all of your existing mail, contacts, and calendar events from your old provider into your new Fastmail account.
Learn more
Upgrade to professional email @yourdomain.com
Hosting email for your domain with Fastmail is easy, and unlocks email super powers.
Learn more
Keep your real address private with Masked Email
Stop advertisers using your email as a unique identifier to track your activity across the web.
Learn more
Light or dark?
Choose your colours, make it yours.
Customize our app to work just the way you like it.
Learn more
Be
better
at email
Search that really finds stuff
Great search turns your email archive from a pile of words into a gold mine of information, so you can make email your electronic memory.
Learn more
Avoid embarrassing mistakes with undo send
We’ve all had that “oh ****” moment. With undo send, that’s a thing of the past.
Learn more
Work on your time with scheduled send
Schedule it now, and have your message arrive exactly when you want.
Learn more
Pin important messages for instant access
Got a super-important message you need to keep track of? Put a pin in it, and it’ll stay stuck to the top of your inbox rather than lost in a wave of newer email.
Learn more
Snooze messages to just when you need them
Whether it’s tickets to that stadium gig in September, or a bill due next Thursday, sometimes you receive an email
now
that you need to see
then
.
Learn more
Stick private memos on your messages
Remind yourself of something you need to do, when you paid a bill, notes from a side conversation, or anything else.
Learn more
Mute never-ending conversations
Mute a conversation you’re not interested in, and all future replies will skip your inbox so you don’t have to worry about it again.
Learn more
Declutter your inbox
Great spam protection, easy unsubscribe, and powerful rules if you want even more control.
Learn more
More than just mail
Give context to your contacts
A powerful address book that automatically surfaces recent conversations and upcoming meetings.
Learn more
Stay organized with a better calendar
Breeze through your day with a beautiful calendar that’s fully integrated with your email.
Learn more
It’s OK to make mistakes
We all make mistakes. That’s why we’ve built multi-level undo into almost every area of Fastmail.
Learn more
Wield the full power on the go
Our app gives you the full power of Fastmail, perfectly formatted for the small screen — not some cut-down version for your phone.
Learn more

analysis.name: Fastmail
analysis.value_proposition: Fast, private, ad-free email hosting with calendars and contacts for individuals and businesses.
analysis.ideal_customer: Privacy-conscious individuals, families, and small businesses wanting an independent, ad-free alternative to Gmail/Outlook, often with custom domains.

features.name: email hosting
features.description: Private, fast IMAP/JMAP email hosting.
features.evidence_quote: Fast, private email hosting for you or your business.

features.name: calendar
features.description: Fast, beautiful calendar integrated with email.
features.evidence_quote: Stay on schedule with our fast, beautiful calendar.

features.name: contacts
features.description: Address book that surfaces recent conversations and meetings.
features.evidence_quote: A powerful address book that automatically surfaces recent conversations and upcoming meetings.

features.name: file storage
features.description: Cloud file storage bundled with account.
features.evidence_quote: 50 GB for mail, calendar and contacts, and 10 GB for file storage.

features.name: masked email
features.description: Auto-generated unique email addresses to hide your real address.
features.evidence_quote: Masked Email to hide address and secure logins

features.name: email aliases
features.description: Multiple additional addresses per account.
features.evidence_quote: Extra email addresses for personal and work

features.name: custom domain email
features.description: Use your own domains for custom addresses like you@yourdomain.com.
features.evidence_quote: Use your own domains to make custom addresses

features.name: pinned messages
features.description: Pin important messages to top of inbox.
features.evidence_quote: Pin important messages to the top of your inbox for instant access.

features.name: snooze
features.description: Snooze messages to reappear at a chosen time.
features.evidence_quote: Snooze tickets and bills to just when you need them.

features.name: scheduled send
features.description: Schedule messages to send at a chosen time.
features.evidence_quote: Scheduled Send and Snooze for better focus

features.name: undo send
features.description: Recall a message shortly after sending.
features.evidence_quote: Avoid embarrassing mistakes with undo send

features.name: offline support

features.name: private memos
features.description: Attach private notes/reminders to messages.
features.evidence_quote: Add a private message, reminders, or payment details to your messages.

features.name: vip notifications
features.description: Notifications restricted to VIP senders.
features.evidence_quote: Avoid unwanted interruptions with VIP-only notifications.

features.name: spy pixel blocking
features.description: Blocks tracking pixels in emails.
features.evidence_quote: Stop spy pixels tracking your location.

features.name: spam protection
features.description: Robust spam filtering.
features.evidence_quote: Great spam protection, easy unsubscribe, and powerful rules

features.name: easy unsubscribe

features.evidence_quote: Great spam protection, easy unsubscribe, and powerful rules

features.name: mute conversations

features.evidence_quote: Mute a conversation you're not interested in

features.name: powerful search
features.description: Full-text search across email archive.
features.evidence_quote: Find any message in seconds with our powerful search.

features.name: encryption at rest and in transit

features.evidence_quote: robust encryption of your data both in transit and at rest.

features.description: 2FA for account login.

praised: 'I have used Fastmail for years and never had one problem. Not one.'
'I migrated from Google Workspace to Fastmail and would never go back.'
'Best alternative to Gmail and iCloud for email, calendars, and contacts!' — Jon Henshaw
'Top choice for custom domain emails, whether for business or personal use.'
Masked Email + 1Password integration widely praised on HN (380 upvotes)
complaints: Concerns about US-based servers and jurisdiction (HN: 'FastMail's servers are in the US – what this means for you')
Anti-encryption law concerns (HN: 'FastMail loses customers, faces calls to move over anti-encryption laws')
Past DDoS extortion attacks (HN: 'under DDoS extortion attack')

tiers.name: Individual
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1 user, 60 GB storage (50 mail / 10 files), custom domains, Masked Email, scheduled send

tiers.name: Duo
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2 users, 120 GB total, shared calendars/contacts, everything in Individual

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom domain @yourbusiness.com, admin controls, mix-and-match plans

pricing.notes: 30-day free trial, no credit card required. Discounts scale with commitment: 1mo/12mo/24mo/36mo prepay options (up to ~22% off at 36 months). Business tier pricing not shown in extracted copy but marketed as mix-and-match seats.
